name: claude-toolkit
description: Codex-ready Claude-Toolkit workflows for Linux C/C++ embedded development, AI agent engineering, continuous learning, knowledge capture, planning, Jira triage, and code review.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-ready skills for embedded C/C++, agent workflows, learning, planning, and review.
interface.longDescription: Claude-Toolkit packages reusable Codex skills for Linux C/C++ embedded development, AI agent engineering, continuous-learning workflows, session knowledge capture, Jira-style bug triage, strategic context compaction, planning, and code review. Claude Code slash commands, hooks, and rules remain available in the repository for Claude-specific installation paths.
defaultPrompt: Use the learned skill when the user asks to extract reusable patterns from a session.
Use the learned-jira-bug-workflow skill when the user mentions Jira, BUG, issue keys, or Jira links.
Use the strategic-compact skill when long-running work needs structured context compression.
